title: Ieremias #2408
definition:
Jeremiah = "whom Jehovah has appointed"

 1) the son of Hilkiah of the priests that were in Anathoth. He was
    called very young (B.C. 626) to the prophetic office, and
    prophesied 42 years. He probably died in Egypt.
nasbUsage:
